title: Against-Advocate Brief Output (debate-prism)
description: Schema for the structured report returned by the against-advocate subagent in debate-prism. Parallels for-brief-schema.json plus targetedCitationIndex and the citationOverlap tag.

corePosition.description: One-to-two-sentence best-supported case AGAINST the claim.

citations.description: Ordered list of citations. Primary agent enforces zero URL overlap with the for-advocate's citations after both reports return.

targetedCitationIndex.description: 0-based index into the for-advocate's citations[] that this against-case most directly rebuts, OR null when the against-case attacks the claim generally rather than any single for-citation.

citationOverlap.description: Primary-agent-assigned tag after URL-overlap check. 'none' = no overlap initially. 'resolved' = overlap found, one re-dispatch cleared it. 'unresolved' = overlap persisted after one re-dispatch; report accepted but deprioritized in judge pass.

degradationEvidence.description: Set to 'unverified' when webResearch.performed=false with zero attemptedCalls[] after a re-dispatch.
